subcodes.first_line: O Most Exalted Pen! Make mention of him who hath turned unto Thee, who hath voiced Thy praise, and who hath risen to serve Thee amidst Thy servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم الاعلی ان اذکر من اقبل الیک و نطق بثنائک و قام علی خدمتک بین عبادک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
